title: Draft contributor eval for output-routing investigation
summary: Turn this contributor debugging exchange into a task scaffold that checks both the answer and the inspection path.
acceptanceCriteria: Preserve the maintainer-facing wording about the output-routing bug
Keep the task focused on local artifacts rather than network access
Require a concrete investigation path before the final answer

conversation.content: Contributors keep diagnosing the models --json regression from the wrong file first.
Start from the failing test, then inspect the command implementation, then the renderer.
The task should produce a one-sentence maintainer-facing root cause, not a patch.
Use a tool-use scaffold and tighten the generated verification before promoting it into tasks/.
